misc.title: #ONEPIECE1184 I’ll tell it like it is: there is a reason why Gunko was able to work under Imu. We know based on examples like Loki or Harald, just how DIFFICULT it is for someone from outside the 20 K
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1184 I’ll tell it like it is: there is a reason why Gunko was able to work under Imu. We know based on examples like Loki or Harald, just how DIFFICULT it is for someone from outside the 20 Kingdoms to be accepted as a Holy Knight. Candelle is a Holy Knight who was on a secret mission on Music Island. And Gunko was only accepted because she is Candelle’s daughter. I am 99% certain that Candelle is a Holy Knight. She is the evil women version of Garling, most likely the current Chief commander of the Holy Knights.

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE] It’s still such a shock, that we really got Imu reveal this early in the year. Like this is really still generational moment and fully escalates the Elbaph arc entirely. What more could we
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE] It’s still such a shock, that we really got Imu reveal this early in the year. Like this is really still generational moment and fully escalates the Elbaph arc entirely. What more could we get from this arc?
